goals.description: Assignment A: finish the hardest remaining sections until they’re ~85–90% correct and organized, then export a clean v1 (ready to send).
goals.rationale: Trust/academic reputation are fragile for me—getting a tangible, exportable v1 is the fastest way to prevent the ‘I might look flaky’ spiral.

goals.description: Quiz_prep (35–45 min): do the highest-yield practice first, then write a tight ‘concepts I keep missing’ list + a 5-bullet ‘review last’ checklist for Thu 9AM.
goals.rationale: Unprepared = instant stress spike for me. This gives me certainty and reduces the chance I’ll crash into frantic prep later.

goals.description: Work cutoff + prep for tomorrow: after the above loose ends, stop, prep desk/materials for Wed morning, and start winding down on time (no extra scrolling/perfecting).
goals.rationale: Sleep is my reliability foundation. If I don’t protect it now, everything feels brittle and I spiral.
